Repository with all history and attachments: https://github.com/lequoctran181/IMC_Challenge_2026 . Problem: Kattis IMC 2026 Problem B simplifygeometry. Input/output modified OBJ triangular closed manifold. Constraints: output closed watertight 2-manifold, nondegenerate faces, valid indices; symmetric Hausdorff is over vertices only within 5% AABB diagonal; visual score is six fixed axial camera SSIM on flat normal/depth maps, threshold 0.9; objective minimize output vertex count. Code must compile with g++ -O2 -std=c++17, read stdin/write stdout only, and official sample first line must be exactly 8 12. No prose-only response; produce ready-to-submit code.
